Package io.vertigo.datastore.impl.entitystore

Interface EntityStorePlugin

All Superinterfaces:
io.vertigo.core.node.component.CoreComponent, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Plugin
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractStaticEntityStorePlugin, SqlEntityStorePlugin
public interface EntityStorePlugin extends io.vertigo.core.node.component.Plugin
The DataStorePlugin class defines the logical way used to read and write data in a data store. This plugin can be implemented in a sql or no sql way. this datatore is linked to a dataSpace. Several dtDefinition can be included in a dataSpace.
Author:
pchretien

    • findByCriteria

      <E extends Entity> DtList<E> findByCriteria(DataDefinition dataDefinition, Criteria<E> criteria, DtListState dtListState)
      Finds a list of entities matching a criteria.
      Parameters:
      dataDefinition - the definition of entities to find
      criteria - the criteria to match
      dtListState - listState of rows to retrieve
      Returns:
      the list

    • countByCriteria

      <E extends Entity> Integer countByCriteria(DataDefinition dataDefinition, Criteria<E> criteria)
      Returns the number of elements contained in the definition and matching a criteria.
      Parameters:
      dataDefinition - the definition of entities to count
      criteria - the criteria to match
      Returns:
      the number of elements

    • create

      <E extends Entity> E create(DataDefinition dataDefinition, E entity)
      Creates an object. No object with the same id must have been created previously.
      Parameters:
      dataDefinition - Definition
      entity - Object to create
      Returns:
      the created entity

      Updates an object. This object must have an id.
      Parameters:
      dataDefinition - Definition
      entity - Object to update
